reviewSummary.summary: The draft includes the primary login controls but lacks important workflow navigation and validation elements while also containing weak naming and locator quality issues.

issues.message: Password field is incorrectly classified as textbox instead of password.
issues.suggested_fix: Change the element type to password for better semantic accuracy and downstream automation generation.

issues.message: Element name is too generic and does not clearly describe the authentication field purpose.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename the element to password_textbox or password_input.

issues.message: Locator relies on placeholder text which may change and is less stable than a unique attribute.
issues.suggested_fix: Use xpath=//input[@name='username'] for a more stable locator.

issues.message: Locator relies on placeholder text which may change and is less stable than a unique attribute.
issues.suggested_fix: Use xpath=//input[@name='password'] for a more stable locator.

issues.message: Locator depends only on visible text and may become brittle if button wording changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Use xpath=//button[@type='submit'] for a more stable locator.

issues.message: Branding footer link is low-value for authentication workflow automation.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the branding link from the approved page model.

issues.message: Forgot password navigation link expected by workflow preconditions is missing from the approved elements.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a forgot_password_link element with a stable semantic locator.

issues.message: Invalid login error message element is missing even though negative authentication validation is part of the workflow.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a login_error_message element if observable in the application after failed login attempts.

issues.message: Required-field validation messages for empty username or password scenarios are not represented.
issues.suggested_fix: Add required field validation message elements if present in the UI.

issues.message: Page verification element such as the login title heading is missing from the approved element set.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a login_page_title label element for reliable page state verification.

approved_elements.name: username_textbox
approved_elements.description: Username input field used for authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_textbox
approved_elements.description: Password input field used for secure authentication.

approved_elements.name: login_button
approved_elements.description: Primary button used to submit login credentials.

approved_elements.name: login_page_title
approved_elements.description: Login page title used for page verification.
